content.text:
Subagent orchestration gate
Result: use-subagent-orchestrator
Reason: Strong orchestration signals detected.

Subagents:
- so_mapper
  mode: read-only
  scope: legacy-plugin references and documentation paths
  expected output: files and remaining references
  constraints: no recursive fan-out
- so_reviewer
  mode: read-only
  scope: documentation and QA consistency
  expected output: material mismatches only
  constraints: no recursive fan-out
- so_tester
  mode: read-only
  scope: setup verification
  expected output: commands and coverage gaps
  constraints: no recursive fan-out

Synthesis:
- Agreed facts: legacy-plugin references, documentation, QA, and setup paths were validated in separate bounded tracks.
- Tests/verification: run classifier tests and eval trace grading.
